name: CYNTHIAS OF BEND
address: 1245 SE 3RD ST STE B-1, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency response effectiveness could involve ensuring that the access routes to the main building and through the vehicle parking area remain free from obstructions, allowing emergency vehicles to navigate efficiently. Marking clear entry points and exits for the building and parking spaces may support responder visibility and movement. Additionally, maintaining the landscaped area to avoid overgrowth and keeping it clear from access routes may enhance responder navigation and staging capabilities. Implementing these measures could facilitate smoother operational activities and ensure that emergency first responders can efficiently reach all critical areas of the property.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing separation between vegetation and the structure, as well as regularly managing combustible vegetation located nearest to the building, could significantly improve defensible space and assist in reducing potential fire exposure to the property. Ensuring that open terrain surrounding the property remains clear of dense vegetation further limits fuel continuity and supports a buffer zone that can aid in slowing fire progression. Consistently maintaining these open areas and actively managing vegetation directly adjacent to the structure can enhance property preparedness and contribute to long-term wildfire resilience by reducing opportunities for fire spread and facilitating easier firefighter access and suppression efforts.
